response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong leadership experience in senior development roles, including team mentorship and architectural design across diverse tech stacks. His open-source contributions, particularly in GIS and Dlang, align well with the focus on open technologies and Linux environments. While his German proficiency is basic and lacks direct architecture/UML experience, his technical depth and strategic problem-solving compensate significantly.
strengths: Extensive senior-level leadership in software development teams, including mentorship and technical guidance
Proven track record in open-source contributions and Linux/Unix environments, with strong technical depth (Dlang, Node.js, etc.)
Demonstrated expertise in high-performance systems, scalability, and modern software architectures across multiple industries
concerns: Basic German language proficiency (C1 required), which may limit client communication
Limited explicit experience with UML and formal architecture modeling tools
No direct experience in IT security, risk management, or compliance—critical for the role
